Package de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.processing

package de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.processing
The processor pipeline that extends per-neighbor evaluation.

ValidationProcessor accepts or rejects a neighbor; CostProcessor contributes an additional Cost to its G-cost. Both extend Processor, whose initializeSearch/finalizeSearch lifecycle runs once per search. Validators provides boolean composites (allOf, anyOf, noneOf, not) that propagate the lifecycle to their children.

Processors are configured as ordered lists on the PathfinderConfiguration and run inside the search's hot loop, once per surviving neighbor; allocations and blocking calls in implementations directly affect search throughput. Exceptions thrown by a processor end the search with a failed result.

Since:
5.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing
    Core pathfinding contracts.
    de.bsommerfeld.pathetic.api.pathing.processing.context
    Read-only context objects handed to processors.
  • Class
    Description
    Cost
    Represents a cost value used in pathfinding.
    CostProcessor
    A processor that calculates a specific cost contribution for traversing to a node (PathPosition).
    Processor
    Base interface for pathfinding processors.
    ValidationProcessor
    A processor that validates whether a node (PathPosition) or the transition to it is permissible during pathfinding.
    Validators
    Utility class for creating and combining ValidationProcessor instances.
